narrative_votes: URW: Negative Consequences for the West

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: तीसरा विश्व युद्ध छिड़ा तो 3 टुकड़ों में बंट जाएगी दुनिया!
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text evokes fear about the potential consequences of a third world war, suggesting that it could lead to the division of the world into three parts.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: कोविड से कमजोर हुई दुनिया में महंगाई बढ़ी. देशों के अंदरुनी हालात बिगड़ रहे हैं. इसपर रूस-यूक्रेन युद्ध ढेर पर चिंगारी का काम कर रहा है.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text speculates about the potential outcomes of the Russia-Ukraine war, suggesting that it could lead to a wider conflict and have severe consequences for the world.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: नाटो यानी नॉर्थ अटलाटिंक ट्रीटी ऑर्गनाइजेशन वो संगठन है, जिसमें रूस का कट्टर दुश्मन अमेरिका भी शामिल है.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text criticizes the Western countries and their diplomatic efforts, portraying NATO as an organization that is opposed to Russia and suggesting that the West is to blame for the conflict.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: तीसरा विश्व युद्ध छिड़ा तो 3 टुकड़ों में बंट जाएगी दुनिया!
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text evokes fear about the potential consequences of a third world war, suggesting that it could lead to the division of the world into three parts.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: जल्दी युद्धविराम न हो, तो दोनों देशों की आग पूरी दुनिया में फैल जाएगी और चाहे-अनचाहे हर कोई युद्ध का हिस्सा होगा.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text speculates about the potential outcomes of the war, suggesting that it could spread to the entire world and involve many countries.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: नाटो यानी नॉर्थ अटलाटिंक ट्रीटी ऑर्गनाइजेशन वो संगठन है, जिसमें रूस का कट्टर दुश्मन अमेरिका भी शामिल है.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text criticizes the Western countries, particularly the US, and their role in the NATO organization, suggesting that they are opposed to Russia.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: कोविड वैक्सीन का असमान बंटवारा भी बनेगा वजह
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text highlights the negative consequences of the COVID-19 vaccine distribution, suggesting that it could lead to further divisions and conflicts.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text evokes fear about the potential consequences of a third world war, suggesting that it could lead to the division of the world into three parts.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text speculates about the potential outcomes of the war between Russia and Ukraine, suggesting that it could lead to a global conflict.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: कोविड वैक्सीन का असमान बंटवारा भी बनेगा वजह
